complaints.title: A large pothole has formed in the middle of the ro...
complaints.description: A large pothole has formed in the middle of the road, causing inconvenience and posing a safety risk to vehicles and pedestrians. Vehicles are forced to slow down suddenly or swerve, which increases the chances of accidents. The pothole has been present for several days and is getting worse due to continuous traffic and weather conditions. Immediate repair is required to ensure road safety and smooth traffic flow.

complaints.description: Stagnant water pooled near storm drain on Park Avenue is a serious dengue risk.
